Essential Relocation Guides

Moving Checklist

Step-by-step timeline for your Florida move. What to do 8 weeks out through moving day.

Florida Driver's License

How to get your Florida DL, transfer your out-of-state license, and what to bring to the DMV.

Homestead Exemption

Save thousands on property taxes. How to file, deadlines, and who qualifies.

Hurricane Prep Guide

What you need to know about hurricane season, supplies, evacuation zones, and insurance.

Best Beaches

Ranked: the best beaches across Tampa Bay for families, couples, and anyone who loves sand.

Schools Guide

School districts, ratings, and what to know about education in each county.
